title: pappophorum persicum
intro: Pappophorum persicum, also known as Persian cotton, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Pappophorum persicum include reducing inflammation and alleviating coughs, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or combined with other herbs to create a soothing expectorant syrup.
